title: zephyranthes graciliflora
intro: Zephyranthes graciliflora, also known as the Lilyturf or Fairy Lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Zephyranthes graciliflora include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing, and it is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for its medicinal uses.
